lastReleaseMessage: advanced search & sort: sort catteries by name/top-rated/most-reviewed and kittens by newest/price on the find and available-kittens pages, with URL-persisted sort

milestone.label: Phase 2 built (escrow payments, reviews, waitlists, admin tiers); launch-readiness next

items: Verify breeder release-to-payout end-to-end after a breeder completes Stripe onboarding (Connect now enabled in test; onboarding link generation verified)
Auth dashboard config: OTP email template + redirect URLs so real sign-in delivers codes
Custom SMTP + notifications (email on new inquiry, message, deposit, waitlist)
Register apex yesandcattery.com + route; remove demo data at launch
Legal review of Terms + Privacy; onboard founding breeders with real data
Custom SMTP (Resend) for auth + notification emails at volume (needs the Resend key entered in Supabase; blocked from auto-reuse)
Notification emails (new inquiry / message / deposit / waitlist) once SMTP is on
Empty-state and error hardening; go-live ops (monitoring, backups)
Phase 3: transport coordination, health-guarantee records, dispute handling
